examples: But a small part, protected by a heat shield made of carbon-phenolic resin, survived and landed in the desert near Woomera.

What was left of the hypersonic engine crashed into the desert 400 km (250 miles) west of Woomera.
The tests, carried out at Woomera (once the British empire's equivalent of Cape Canaveral), involved a charge equivalent to six tonnes of TNT.
